scope: baseline pass-rate floor enforcement for the 94.0 cohort gate
learner_facing_quality_improvement: The qrel verification command now rejects baseline cohort reports that still match fixture metadata but slip below the 94.0 pass-rate floor, reducing the chance of shipping a weaker learner-facing RAG baseline as if it were still gate-clean.
notes: This wave only touched the qrel verifier and a lane-local report artifact.
The current baseline report clears both metadata alignment and the 94.0 overall pass-rate floor.
